message:
feat(test): add ingest repro test and update search bridge proptests

Add ingest_repro.rs reproducing alt-screen transition data loss scenario
(gap detection on alt-screen entry) for regression verification.

Update proptest_search_bridge.rs import ordering for consistency with
rustfmt conventions.
